Defendant Dignity Health Dba Marian Regional Medical Center Notice Of Petition And Petition To Compel Arbitration And Notice Of Stay Action Pending Arbitration; Joinder In Optum360 Services, Inc. Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Jan-13-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. JANETTE LEE, ESQ. of Feldman Browne Olivares (Tel: 310-207-8500) appearing via CourtCall for plaintiff Lawshawn Madison;
Atty. KIMBERLEY A. WORLEY, ESQ. of Atkinson Andelson Loya Ruud & Romo (Tel: 916-923-1200) appearing via CourtCall for defendant Dignity Health dba Marian Regional Medical Center;
Atty. MICHAEL S. KALT, ESQ. of Wilson Turner Kosmo LLP (Tel: 619-236-9600) appearing for defendants UnitedHealth Group Incorporated and Optum 360 Services, Inc.

HEARING RE: Defendant Dignity Health Dba Marian Regional Medical Center's Petition To Compel Arbitration and Stay.

Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Dignity Health's petition to compel arbitration and stay is granted. Dignity Health is a non-signatory to the arbitration agreement and joined Unitedhealth Group Incorporated and Optum360 Services, Inc.'s petition to compel arbitration. Dignity Health contends that it can compel arbitration because it is an intended third-party beneficiary of the arbitration agreement and/or an agent of Unitedhealth Group Incorporated and Optum360 Services, Inc. Plaintiff does not contest these assertions and merely incorporates by reference its opposition to the companion motion. For the reasons stated in the ruling for the companion motion, Dignity Health's petition to compel arbitration and stay is granted.

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano, CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
